description: rockport Allander is the first-ever classic dress shoe engineered with an athletic sole. Made for professional men who love their formal wear and want to look sharp and crisp, the Allander is lighter than traditional running shoes and has great shock absorbers, which allows you to run from one meeting to another without any fear of stress or slipping. Replete with a smooth, flawless upper and a plain toe silhouette, it's a great addition to any sophisticated man's wardrobe.Upper   Full-grain leather upper for added durability and style Nappa leather lining for moisture absorption and abrasion resistance Leather wrap-around overlay along the heel and midfoot for better support Plain toe design for a neater, crisper look and extra durability Strobel construction for added stability and forefoot flexibility Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Mesh inner for ample breathability Lightly padded tongue with perforations for better ventilation Brand badge on lateral ankle   Midsole   EVA midsole with shock absorbers for lightweight comfort Moisture-absorbent and odour-resistant ortholite footbed for all-day comfort Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic   Outsole   Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole delivers shock absorption reducing foot fatigue Horizontal grooves throughout for better grip Rectangular grooves on the lateral heel, midfoot and medial forefoot for improved grip and traction on various surfaces Horse shoe pattern heel with a horizontal scoop for cushioning Flex grooves in the forefoot for easy movement Raised heel for a stylish look and ergonomic comfort   Shoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shineDo not store in direct sunlightUse a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shine
